cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Akash Joshi? Ji, I'm calling from Poorvika regarding your service ticket.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Akash. Who is this? How did you get my number, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I'm your dedicated support agent. We received your query about a defective laptop bag. Can you please confirm your order ID for verification, thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: My order ID is PO12345. But how do I know you're really from Poorvika?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, thank you for verifying, sir. Now, let me walk you through our return process. You'll need to visit our website and fill out the return form.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. But what about my bank details for the refund? I bank with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'll send you a refund confirmation email with all the details. You can then verify it with your bank, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, that makes sense. Thank you for your help, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, Akash ji. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 72s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A [ECOMMERCE_PLATFORM] customer support agent calls a user in response to a service ticket about a defective [ELECTRONICS_ITEM]. The agent verifies the user's identity by asking for the order ID and then explains the return process.
